provides.name: semantic-retrieval-adapter search
provides.summary: Read-only citation-bearing semantic/hybrid retrieval over path-, tag-, or metadata-filtered OpenClerk documents using local Ollama or opt-in Gemini embeddings.

credentials: GEMINI_API_KEY only when provider is gemini, or when fallback_provider is explicitly gemini and Ollama is unavailable
requires.network: none for Ollama; provider egress for Gemini

artifacts.cache: rebuildable user-cache artifact outside committed repo

steps: Build or run modules/semantic-retrieval-adapter separately from OpenClerk core.
Use provider ollama for local/offline search when Ollama and an embedding model are installed.
Use provider gemini only with explicit opt-in and runtime_config:GEMINI_API_KEY.
install.uninstall: Remove the module binary and optional user-cache directory without changing OpenClerk core.

compatibility.openclerk_runner: uses OpenClerk read-only document primitives and returns citations
compatibility.search_default: does not replace openclerk retrieval search
compatibility.schema: does not add core runner request or response fields
